subject: physics
title: 18M.1.SL.TZ2.29
question_html:
Three gases in the atmosphere are

          I.     carbon dioxide (CO2)

          II.     dinitrogen monoxide (N2O)

          III.     oxygen (O2).

Which of these are considered to be greenhouse gases?

A.     I and II only

B.     I and III only

C.     II and III only

D.     I, II and III
